                                                                                                                                                                                                        Since 2Lpro=0 ,we have: 由于2Lpro=0，我们有：

                                                                                                                                                                                                        (6)T our T naive =1m(m+n)⋅(1+(m2+mn)⋅α1+α)r

                                                                                                                                                                                                         

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Since α meets 0<α≪1 ,we can use the small value approximation principle (1+pα1+qα)r≈(1+(p−q)α)r to simplify the equation: 由于α满足0<α≪1，我们可以使用小量近似原理(1+pα1+qα)r≈(1+(p−q)α)r来简化方程：

                                                                                                                                                                                                        (7)T our T naive <1m+n⋅(1+(m2+mn−1)⋅α)rm

                                                                                                                                                                                                         

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Then we use the prior 1≤m≤5 and 1≤n≤100 to scale the coefficient into a constant c . The coefficient monotonically increases with r,n and α : 然后我们利用先验1≤m≤5和1≤n≤100将系数缩放为常数c。该系数随r,n和α单调增加：

                                                                                                                                                                                                        (8)(1+(m2+mn−1)⋅α)rm≤r=2,n=100,α=0.01(0.01m2+m−0.01)2m

                                                                                                                                                                                                         

                                                                                                                                                                                                        The coefficient decreases first and then increases with m . It takes the maximum value when m is at its maximum: 该系数随m先减后增。当m取最大值时，它达到最大：

                                                                                                                                                                                                        (9)(0.01m2+m−0.01)2m≤m=55.49

                                                                                                                                                                                                         

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Consequently, we obtain the ratio: 因此，我们得到比值：

                                                                                                                                                                                                        (10)T our T naive <cm+n

                                                                                                                                                                                                         

                                                                                                                                                                                                        where c=5.49 . Our method reduces the complexity by (m+n) times,from O(m(m+n)) to O(m) . So LLM generates relationship with O(m) complexity,which is much faster than the naive baseline. 其中c=5.49。我们的方法将复杂度降低了(m+n)倍，从O(m(m+n))降至O(m)。因此，LLM生成关系的复杂度为O(m)，这比朴素基线快得多。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        6.4 Prompt

                                                                                                                                                                                                        6.4 提示

                                                                                                                                                                                                        We provide the complete prompts of SG-Nav. 我们提供SG-Nav的完整提示。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Edge Connecting. In the edge connecting process, the complete prompt is as follows: 边连接。在边连接过程中，完整提示如下：

                                                                                                                                                                                                         

                                                                                                                                                                                                        You are an AI assistant with commonsense and strong ability to infer the 你是一名AI助手，具备常识并且能够强力推断

                                                                                                                                                                                                            spatial relationships in an indoor scene.     室内场景中的空间关系。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        You need to provide the possible spatial relationships between several 你需要在若干对象的

                                                                                                                                                                                                        pairs of objects. Relationships include ["next to", "above", "opposite 成对之间给出可能的空间关系。关系包括["next to", "above", "opposite

                                                                                                                                                                                                        to", "below", "inside", "behind", "in front of", ...]. to", "below", "inside", "behind", "in front of", ...]。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        All the pairs of objects are provided in JSON format, and you should 所有对象对以JSON格式提供，你也需要

                                                                                                                                                                                                        also response in JSON format. Here are 2 examples: 以JSON格式作答。下面有2个示例：

                                                                                                                                                                                                        1.

                                                                                                                                                                                                         

                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Input:             输入：

                                                                                                                                                                                                                [{"object1": "chair", "object2": "table"}, {"object1": "monitor",         [{"object1": "chair", "object2": "table"}, {"object1": "monitor",

                                                                                                                                                                                                                    "object2": "desk"}}]             "object2": "desk"}}]

                                                                                                                                                                                                                Response:         回答：

                                                                                                                                                                                                                    [{"relationships": "next to"}, {"relationships": "above"}]             [{"relationships": "next to"}, {"relationships": "above"}]

                                                                                                                                                                                                        2.

                                                                                                                                                                                                         

                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Input:             输入：

                                                                                                                                                                                                                        [{"object1": "sofa", "object2": "TV"}, {"object1": "plant", "object2":                 [{"object1": "沙发", "object2": "电视"}, {"object1": "植物", "object2":

                                                                                                                                                                                                                    "chair"}]             "椅子"}]

                                                                                                                                                                                                            Response:     响应：

                                                                                                                                                                                                                [{"relationships": "opposite to"}, {"relationships": "behind"}]         [{"relationships": "相对"}, {"relationships": "后面"}]

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Now you predict these pairs of objects: [{"object1": {}, "object2": 现在你来预测这些物体对：[{"object1": {}, "object2":

                                                                                                                                                                                                        {}}, {"object1": {}, "object2": {}}, ...] {}}, {"object1": {}, "object2": {}}, ...]

                                                                                                                                                                                                         

                                                                                                                                                                                                        where {} will be replace by the object categories. 其中{}将被物体类别替换。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Hierarchical CoT. In the process of goal inference, we use the following prompts to let LLM predict the most likely position of goal. 分层CoT。在目标推理过程中，我们使用以下提示让LLM预测目标最可能的位置。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Step 1 (Predict Distance of Object):

                                                                                                                                                                                                        第 1 步（预测物体距离）：

                                                                                                                                                                                                         

                                                                                                                                                                                                            You are an AI assistant with commonsense and strong ability to infer the     你是一名具备常识且能够强力推断室内场景中

                                                                                                                                                                                                                distance between two objects in an indoor scene.         两个物体之间距离的 AI 助手。

                                                                                                                                                                                                            You need to predict the most likely distance of two objects in a room.     你需要预测房间里两个物体最可能的距离。

                                                                                                                                                                                                            You need to answer the distance in meters and give your reason. Here is     你需要以“米”为单位回答距离，并说明你的理由。以下是

                                                                                                                                                                                                                the JSON format:         JSON 格式：

                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Input:             输入：

                                                                                                                                                                                                        {"object1": "table", "object2": "chair"} {"object1": "table", "object2": "chair"}

                                                                                                                                                                                                            Response:     输出：

                                                                                                                                                                                                        {"distance": 0.5, "reason": "Because there is always a chair next to {"distance": 0.5, "reason": "因为椅子总是在桌子旁边。"

                                                                                                                                                                                                            the table."}     }

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Now predict the distance and give your reason: {"object1": {}, 现在预测距离并说明你的理由：{"object1": {},

                                                                                                                                                                                                                    "object2": {}}             "object2": {}}

                                                                                                                                                                                                         

                                                                                                                                                                                                        where { } will be replace by the object. 其中 { } 将替换为对应的物体。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Step 2 (Ask Question):

                                                                                                                                                                                                        第 2 步（提问）：

                                                                                                                                                                                                         

                                                                                                                                                                                                                You are an AI assistant with commonsense and strong ability to infer the         你是一个具有常识、且能准确推断室内场景中空间关系的 AI 助手。

                                                                                                                                                                                                            spatial relationships in an indoor scene.     在室内场景中。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        But you have insufficient information. You need to ask a question 但你信息不足。你需要在下面的 JSON 格式中

                                                                                                                                                                                                        about the spatial relationship between the object and the goal in the 询问该物体与目标之间的空间关系：

                                                                                                                                                                                                            following JSON format:     如下 JSON 格式：

                                                                                                                                                                                                                Input:         输入：

                                                                                                                                                                                                        {"object": "sofa", "goal": "TV"} {"object": "sofa", "goal": "TV"}

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Response: 回应：

                                                                                                                                                                                                        {"question": "Is there a table next to the sofa?"} {"question": "沙发旁边有一张桌子吗？"}

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Now ask question: {"object": {}, "goal": {}} 现在提问：{"object": {}, "goal": {}}

                                                                                                                                                                                                         

                                                                                                                                                                                                        where { } will be replace by the object and goal. 其中 { } 将被物体和目标替换。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Step 3 (Answer Question):

                                                                                                                                                                                                        第 3 步（回答问题）：

                                                                                                                                                                                                         

                                                                                                                                                                                                            You are an AI assistant with commonsense and strong ability to answer     你是一个具备常识和强大回答能力的 AI 助手

                                                                                                                                                                                                                question about the objects in an indoor scene.         来回答室内场景中物体相关的问题。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Given a graph scene of the scene, you need to answer the question in the 给定场景的图，你需要按以下 JSON 格式回答问题：

                                                                                                                                                                                                                following JSON format:         输入：

                                                                                                                                                                                                                Input:

                                                                                                                                                                                                         

                                                                                                                                                                                                        {"subgraph": {"nodes": ["sofa", "table", ...], "edges": ["sofa next to {"subgraph": {"nodes": ["sofa", "table", ...], "edges": ["sofa next to

                                                                                                                                                                                                        table", ...]}, "question": "Is there a table next to the sofa?"} table", ...]}, "question": "沙发旁边有桌子吗？"}

                                                                                                                                                                                                            Response:     输出：

                                                                                                                                                                                                        {"answer": "Yes"} {"answer": "Yes"}

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Now answer question: {"subgraph": {}, "question": {}} 现在回答问题：{"subgraph": {}, "question": {}}

                                                                                                                                                                                                         

                                                                                                                                                                                                        where { } will be replace by the subgraph and question. 其中 { } 将被子图和问题替换。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Step 4 (Predict Distance of Subgraph): 第 4 步（预测子图距离）：

                                                                                                                                                                                                         

                                                                                                                                                                                                            You are an AI assistant with commonsense and strong ability to infer the     你是一个具备常识和强大推断能力的 AI 助手

                                                                                                                                                                                                            distance between a subgraph and a goal in an indoor scene.     来推断室内场景中一个子图与目标之间的距离。

                                                                                                                                                                                                            You need to predict the most likely distance of a subgraph and a goal in     你需要预测一个子图与目标在

                                                                                                                                                                                                            a room. You need to answer the distance in meters and give your reason.     一个房间。你需要用米为单位回答距离，并给出理由。

                                                                                                                                                                                                            Here is the JSON format:     JSON 格式如下：

                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Input:             输入：

                                                                                                                                                                                                        {"subgraph": {"nodes": ["sofa", "table", ...], "edges": ["sofa next to {"subgraph": {"nodes": ["sofa", "table", ...], "edges": ["sofa next to

                                                                                                                                                                                                            table", ...]}, "goal": "TV"}     table", ...]}, "goal": "TV"}

                                                                                                                                                                                                            Response:     输出：

                                                                                                                                                                                                        {"distance": 2, "reason": "Because TV and sofa are on both sides of {"distance": 2, "reason": "Because TV and sofa are on both sides of

                                                                                                                                                                                                                table."}         table."}

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Now predict the distance and give your reason: {"subgraph": {}, "goal": 现在预测距离并给出理由：{"subgraph": {}, "goal":

                                                                                                                                                                                                        {} }

                                                                                                                                                                                                         

                                                                                                                                                                                                         

                                                                                                                                                                                                        where {} will be replace by the subgraph and goal. 其中 {} 将被子图和目标替换。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        6.5 Visualization

                                                                                                                                                                                                        6.5 可视化

                                                                                                                                                                                                        We further provide visualizations on the constructed scene graphs, the frontier scores along with the LLM reasoning output, and failure case to help comprehensive understanding of our approach. 我们进一步提供对所构建场景图、前沿分数以及包含 LLM 推理输出的可视化，并给出失败案例，以帮助全面理解我们的方法。

                                                                                                                                                                                                         

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Figure 8: Visualization of two scene graphs. 图 8：两个场景图的可视化。

                                                                                                                                                                                                         

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Figure 9: Visualization for the sequential frontier scoring and reasoning output of LLM. We color the frontiers, where frontiers with high score are in red and ones with low score are in blue. 图 9：LLM 的顺序前沿评分及推理输出可视化。我们对前沿进行着色：高分前沿为红色，低分前沿为蓝色。

                                                                                                                                                                                                         

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Figure 10: Three failure cases of navigation. In the first case, agent mistakes shelf for cabinet and navigates to it. In the second case, agent fails to detect the goal object. In the third case, LLM predicts a wrong location of chair because there are sofa and TV near this frontier, where there is high probability of chair to appear here. This makes the agent harder to find the goal in limited steps. 图 10：三种导航失败案例。第一种情况下，智能体把货架误认为橱柜并导航过去。第二种情况下，智能体未能检测到目标物体。第三种情况下，LLM 预测椅子的错误位置，因为该前沿附近有沙发和电视，而在这里出现椅子的概率较高。这使得智能体在有限步数内更难找到目标。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        NeurIPS Paper Checklist

                                                                                                                                                                                                        NeurIPS论文检查清单

                                                                                                                                                                                                        1. Claims

                                                                                                                                                                                                        1. 论点

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Question: Do the main claims made in the abstract and introduction accurately reflect the paper's contributions and scope? 问题：摘要和引言中的主要论断是否准确反映了论文的贡献与研究范围？

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Answer: [Yes]

                                                                                                                                                                                                        答案：[Yes]

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Justification: The main claims made in the abstract and introduction accurately reflect the paper's contributions and scope. 理由：摘要和引言中的主要主张准确反映了论文的贡献和范围。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Guidelines: 指南：

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • The answer NA means that the abstract and introduction do not include the claims made in the paper.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 答案 NA 表示摘要和引言未包含论文中的主张。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • The abstract and/or introduction should clearly state the claims made, including the contributions made in the paper and important assumptions and limitations. A No or NA answer to this question will not be perceived well by the reviewers.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 摘要和/或引言应清楚陈述所提出的主张，包括论文的贡献以及重要的假设和局限性。对此问题回答 No 或 NA 不会给审稿人留下好印象。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • The claims made should match theoretical and experimental results, and reflect how much the results can be expected to generalize to other settings.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 所提出的主张应与理论和实验结果相符，并体现这些结果可推广到其他设置的程度。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • It is fine to include aspirational goals as motivation as long as it is clear that these goals are not attained by the paper.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 只要明确这些目标并未由论文实现，加入理想化目标作为动机是可以的。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        2. Limitations

                                                                                                                                                                                                        2. 局限性

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Question: Does the paper discuss the limitations of the work performed by the authors? 问题：论文是否讨论了作者所做工作的局限性？

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Answer: [Yes] 回答：[是]

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Justification: We have discussed the limitations in Section5 理由：我们已在第5节讨论了局限性

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Guidelines: 指南：

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • The answer NA means that the paper has no limitation while the answer No means that the paper has limitations, but those are not discussed in the paper.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 答案 NA 表示论文没有局限性，而答案 No 表示论文有局限性，但文中未讨论这些局限性。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • The authors are encouraged to create a separate "Limitations" section in their paper.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 鼓励作者在论文中单独设置“局限性”部分。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • The paper should point out any strong assumptions and how robust the results are to violations of these assumptions (e.g., independence assumptions, noiseless settings, model well-specification, asymptotic approximations only holding locally). The authors should reflect on how these assumptions might be violated in practice and what the implications would be.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 论文应指出任何强假设，以及结果对这些假设被违反时的稳健性（例如，独立性假设、无噪声设置、模型设定正确、渐近近似仅在局部成立）。作者应反思这些假设在实践中可能如何被违反，以及其影响是什么。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • The authors should reflect on the scope of the claims made, e.g., if the approach was only tested on a few datasets or with a few runs. In general, empirical results often depend on implicit assumptions, which should be articulated.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 作者应反思所作主张的适用范围，例如该方法是否只在少量数据集或少量运行上测试过。一般而言，经验结果往往依赖隐含假设，这些假设应被明确说明。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • The authors should reflect on the factors that influence the performance of the approach. For example, a facial recognition algorithm may perform poorly when image resolution is low or images are taken in low lighting. Or a speech-to-text system might not be used reliably to provide closed captions for online lectures because it fails to handle technical jargon.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 作者应反思影响该方法性能的因素。例如，面部识别算法在图像分辨率低或图像处于弱光条件下时可能表现不佳。又或者，语音转文字系统可能无法可靠地为在线讲座提供字幕，因为它无法处理专业术语。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • The authors should discuss the computational efficiency of the proposed algorithms and how they scale with dataset size.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 作者应讨论所提算法的计算效率，以及它们如何随数据集规模扩展。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • If applicable, the authors should discuss possible limitations of their approach to address problems of privacy and fairness.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 如适用，作者应讨论其方法在处理隐私和公平性问题方面的潜在局限。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • While the authors might fear that complete honesty about limitations might be used by reviewers as grounds for rejection, a worse outcome might be that reviewers discover limitations that aren't acknowledged in the paper. The authors should use their best judgment and recognize that individual actions in favor of transparency play an important role in developing norms that preserve the integrity of the community. Reviewers will be specifically instructed to not penalize honesty concerning limitations.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 尽管作者可能担心如实说明局限性会被审稿人视为拒稿理由，但更糟的结果可能是审稿人发现了论文中未被承认的局限性。作者应尽其所能作出判断，并认识到有助于透明度的个人行为在形成维护社区完整性的规范方面起着重要作用。审稿人将被特别要求不要因作者坦诚局限性而予以扣分。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        3. Theory Assumptions and Proofs

                                                                                                                                                                                                        3. 理论假设与证明

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Question: For each theoretical result, does the paper provide the full set of assumptions and a complete (and correct) proof? 问题：对于每个理论结果，论文是否提供了完整的假设集合以及完整且正确的证明？

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Answer: [Yes]

                                                                                                                                                                                                        答案：[是]

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Justification: We provide the full set of assumptions as well as a complete proof in Section 6.3 说明：我们在第 6.3 节中给出了完整的假设集合以及完整证明

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Guidelines: 准则：

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • The answer NA means that the paper does not include theoretical results.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 答案 NA 表示论文不包含理论结果。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • All the theorems, formulas, and proofs in the paper should be numbered and cross-referenced.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 论文中的所有定理、公式和证明都应编号，并进行交叉引用。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • All assumptions should be clearly stated or referenced in the statement of any theorems.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 在任何定理的表述中，所有假设都应明确给出或被引用。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • The proofs can either appear in the main paper or the supplemental material, but if they appear in the supplemental material, the authors are encouraged to provide a short proof sketch to provide intuition.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 证明可以出现在正文论文或补充材料中；但如果出现在补充材料中，作者应鼓励提供简短的证明思路，以便提供直观理解。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • Inversely, any informal proof provided in the core of the paper should be complemented by formal proofs provided in appendix or supplemental material.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 反过来，如果在正文中提供了任何非正式证明，应当用附录或补充材料中的形式化证明进行补充。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • Theorems and Lemmas that the proof relies upon should be properly referenced.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 证明所依赖的定理和引理应当被正确引用。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        4. Experimental Result Reproducibility

                                                                                                                                                                                                        4. 实验结果可复现性

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Question: Does the paper fully disclose all the information needed to reproduce the main experimental results of the paper to the extent that it affects the main claims and/or conclusions of the paper (regardless of whether the code and data are provided or not)? 问题：论文是否充分披露了复现实验主要结果所需的全部信息，使其能够影响论文的主要论断和/或结论（不论是否提供代码和数据）？

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Answer: [Yes]

                                                                                                                                                                                                        答案：[是]

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Justification: The results in our paper can be reproduced by the readers. 说明：本文中的结果可由读者复现。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Guidelines: 指南：

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • The answer NA means that the paper does not include experiments.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 答案 NA 表示论文不包含实验。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • If the paper includes experiments, a No answer to this question will not be perceived well by the reviewers: Making the paper reproducible is important, regardless of whether the code and data are provided or not.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 如果论文包含实验，这个问题回答为否不会被审稿人看好：无论是否提供代码和数据，使论文可复现都很重要。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • If the contribution is a dataset and/or model, the authors should describe the steps taken to make their results reproducible or verifiable.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 如果贡献是数据集和/或模型，作者应描述为使结果可复现或可验证所采取的步骤。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • Depending on the contribution, reproducibility can be accomplished in various ways. For example, if the contribution is a novel architecture, describing the architecture fully might suffice, or if the contribution is a specific model and empirical evaluation, it may be necessary to either make it possible for others to replicate the model with the same dataset, or provide access to the model. In general. releasing code and data is often one good way to accomplish this, but reproducibility can also be provided via detailed instructions for how to replicate the results, access to a hosted model (e.g., in the case of a large language model), releasing of a model checkpoint, or other means that are appropriate to the research performed.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 根据贡献不同，复现性可以通过多种方式实现。例如，如果贡献是一种新架构，完整描述该架构可能就足够；如果贡献是一个具体模型和实证评估，则可能需要让他人能够用相同数据集复现该模型，或提供对该模型的访问权限。一般来说，发布代码和数据通常是实现这一点的一种好方法，但也可以通过提供详细的结果复现说明、提供托管模型的访问权限（例如在大型语言模型的情况下）、发布模型检查点，或其他适合所进行研究的方式来保证可复现性。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • While NeurIPS does not require releasing code, the conference does require all submissions to provide some reasonable avenue for reproducibility, which may depend on the nature of the contribution. For example

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 尽管 NeurIPS 不要求发布代码，但会议要求所有投稿都提供某种合理的可复现途径，这可能取决于贡献的性质。例如

                                                                                                                                                                                                        (a) If the contribution is primarily a new algorithm, the paper should make it clear how to reproduce that algorithm. (a) 如果贡献主要是一种新算法，论文应清楚说明如何复现该算法。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        (b) If the contribution is primarily a new model architecture, the paper should describe the architecture clearly and fully. (b) 如果贡献主要是一种新的模型架构，论文应清晰而完整地描述该架构。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        (c) If the contribution is a new model (e.g., a large language model), then there should either be a way to access this model for reproducing the results or a way to reproduce the model (e.g., with an open-source dataset or instructions for how to construct the dataset). (c) 如果贡献是一个新模型（例如大型语言模型），那么应当要么提供访问该模型以复现结果的方式，要么提供复现该模型的方式（例如使用开源数据集或构建该数据集的说明）。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        (d) We recognize that reproducibility may be tricky in some cases, in which case authors are welcome to describe the particular way they provide for reproducibility. In the case of closed-source models, it may be that access to the model is limited in some way (e.g., to registered users), but it should be possible for other researchers to have some path to reproducing or verifying the results. (d) 我们认识到在某些情况下可复现性可能较为棘手，因此欢迎作者描述他们提供可复现性的具体方式。对于闭源模型，访问该模型可能会在某种程度上受限（例如仅限注册用户），但其他研究人员应当能够找到某种路径来复现或验证结果。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        5. Open access to data and code

                                                                                                                                                                                                        5. 数据与代码开源

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Question: Does the paper provide open access to the data and code, with sufficient instructions to faithfully reproduce the main experimental results, as described in supplemental material? 问题：论文是否提供对数据与代码的开源，并附带足够的说明，以便能忠实复现实验中的主要结果（按补充材料所述）？

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Answer: [Yes]

                                                                                                                                                                                                        答案：[是]

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Justification: We have uploaded our code on MP3D dataset in the supplementary materials. We will release all code upon acceptance. It takes some time for us to clean the whole project and make the code easy to play with. 理由：我们已将代码上传到 MP3D 数据集的补充材料中。我们将在接收后发布全部代码。我们需要一些时间来清理整个项目，并使代码更易于使用。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Guidelines: 指南：

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • The answer NA means that paper does not include experiments requiring code.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 若答案为 NA，表示论文不包含需要代码的实验。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • Please see the NeurIPS code and data submission guidelines (https://nips.cc/ public/guides/CodeSubmissionPolicy) for more details.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 请参阅 NeurIPS 代码与数据提交指南（https://nips.cc/ public/guides/CodeSubmissionPolicy）了解更多详情。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • While we encourage the release of code and data, we understand that this might not be possible, so "No" is an acceptable answer. Papers cannot be rejected simply for not including code, unless this is central to the contribution (e.g., for a new open-source benchmark).

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 虽然我们鼓励发布代码和数据，但我们理解这可能并不总是可行，因此“否”也是可接受的答案。仅因为未包含代码而拒稿并不适用，除非这与贡献密切相关（例如新的开源基准）。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • The instructions should contain the exact command and environment needed to run to reproduce the results. See the NeurIPS code and data submission guidelines (https: //nips.cc/public/guides/CodeSubmissionPolicy) for more details.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 说明中应包含用于复现实验结果所需的精确命令和环境。请参阅 NeurIPS 代码与数据提交指南（https://nips.cc/public/guides/CodeSubmissionPolicy）了解更多详情。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • The authors should provide instructions on data access and preparation, including how to access the raw data, preprocessed data, intermediate data, and generated data, etc.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 作者应提供数据访问与准备的说明，包括如何获取原始数据、预处理数据、中间数据以及生成数据等。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • The authors should provide scripts to reproduce all experimental results for the new proposed method and baselines. If only a subset of experiments are reproducible, they should state which ones are omitted from the script and why.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 作者应提供脚本，以复现实验中提出的新方法和所有基线的全部结果。如果只有部分实验可复现，他们应说明脚本中省略的是哪些实验以及原因。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • At submission time, to preserve anonymity, the authors should release anonymized versions (if applicable).

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 在提交时，为了保持匿名性，作者应发布匿名化版本（如适用）。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • Providing as much information as possible in supplemental material (appended to the paper) is recommended, but including URLs to data and code is permitted.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 建议在补充材料中尽可能提供多的信息（附在论文后），但在补充材料中包含数据和代码的 URL 也是允许的。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        6. Experimental Setting/Details

                                                                                                                                                                                                        6. 实验设置/细节

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Question: Does the paper specify all the training and test details (e.g., data splits, hyper-parameters, how they were chosen, type of optimizer, etc.) necessary to understand the results? 问题：论文是否说明了所有必要的训练和测试细节（例如，数据划分、超参数、它们的选择方式、优化器类型等），以便理解结果？

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Answer: [Yes]

                                                                                                                                                                                                        答案: [是]

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Justification: We have specify the experimental settings in Section 4.1 理由：我们已在第4.1节中说明实验设置

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Guidelines: 准则：

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • The answer NA means that the paper does not include experiments.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 答案NA表示论文不包含实验。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • The experimental setting should be presented in the core of the paper to a level of detail that is necessary to appreciate the results and make sense of them.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 实验设置应在论文主体中以达到能够理解结果并使其合理的必要细节程度进行呈现。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • The full details can be provided either with the code, in appendix, or as supplemental material.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 完整细节可通过代码、附录或补充材料提供。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        7. Experiment Statistical Significance

                                                                                                                                                                                                        7. 实验统计显著性

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Question: Does the paper report error bars suitably and correctly defined or other appropriate information about the statistical significance of the experiments? 问题：论文是否以合适且正确定义的方式报告误差条，或给出其他恰当信息，用于说明实验的统计显著性？

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Answer: [No]

                                                                                                                                                                                                        答案：[否]

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Justification: Error bars are not reported because it would be too computationally expensive. Guidelines: 理由：由于计算开销过高，未报告误差条。指南：

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • The answer NA means that the paper does not include experiments.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 答案 NA 表示论文不包含实验。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • The authors should answer "Yes" if the results are accompanied by error bars, confidence intervals, or statistical significance tests, at least for the experiments that support the main claims of the paper.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 如果结果附有误差条、置信区间或统计显著性检验，作者应回答“是”，至少应针对支持论文主要结论的实验如此。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • The factors of variability that the error bars are capturing should be clearly stated (for example, train/test split, initialization, random drawing of some parameter, or overall run with given experimental conditions).

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 误差条所反映的变异因素应明确说明（例如，训练/测试划分、初始化、某个参数的随机抽取，或在给定实验条件下的整体运行）。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • The method for calculating the error bars should be explained (closed form formula, call to a library function, bootstrap, etc.)

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 应说明误差条的计算方法（闭式公式、调用库函数、bootstrap 等）。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • The assumptions made should be given (e.g., Normally distributed errors).

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 应给出所作假设（例如，误差服从正态分布）。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • It should be clear whether the error bar is the standard deviation or the standard error of the mean.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 应明确误差条表示的是标准差还是均值标准误。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • It is OK to report 1-sigma error bars, but one should state it. The authors should preferably report a 2-sigma error bar than state that they have a 96% CI, if the hypothesis of Normality of errors is not verified.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 可以报告 1-sigma 误差条，但应注明。若未验证误差的正态性假设，作者最好报告 2-sigma 误差条，而不是声称其为 96% CI。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • For asymmetric distributions, the authors should be careful not to show in tables or figures symmetric error bars that would yield results that are out of range (e.g. negative error rates).

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 对于非对称分布，作者应注意不要在表格或图中展示会导致超出范围结果的对称误差条（例如负的错误率）。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • If error bars are reported in tables or plots, The authors should explain in the text how they were calculated and reference the corresponding figures or tables in the text.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 如果在表格或图中报告了误差条，作者应在正文中说明其计算方法，并在正文中引用相应的图或表。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        8. Experiments Compute Resources

                                                                                                                                                                                                        8. 实验计算资源

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Question: For each experiment, does the paper provide sufficient information on the computer resources (type of compute workers, memory, time of execution) needed to reproduce the experiments? 问题：对于每个实验，论文是否提供了足够的计算资源信息（计算工作节点类型、内存、执行时间），以便复现实验？

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Answer: [Yes]

                                                                                                                                                                                                        答案：[是]

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Justification: The evaluation of our model is performed on four RTX 3090 GPUs. 理由：我们的模型评估是在四块 RTX 3090 GPU 上进行的。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Guidelines: 指南：

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • The answer NA means that the paper does not include experiments.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 答案 NA 表示论文不包含实验。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • The paper should indicate the type of compute workers CPU or GPU, internal cluster, or cloud provider, including relevant memory and storage.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 论文应说明计算工作器的类型：CPU 或 GPU、内部集群或云服务提供商，并包括相关内存和存储信息。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • The paper should provide the amount of compute required for each of the individual experimental runs as well as estimate the total compute.

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 论文应提供每个单独实验运行所需的计算量，并估算总计算量。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • The paper should disclose whether the full research project required more compute than the experiments reported in the paper (e.g., preliminary or failed experiments that didn't make it into the paper).

                                                                                                                                                                                                        • 论文应披露整个研究项目是否需要比论文中报告的实验更多的计算资源（例如未写入论文的初步实验或失败实验）。

                                                                                                                                                                                                        9. Code Of Ethics

                                                                                                                                                                                                        9. 伦理规范

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Question: Does the research conducted in the paper conform, in every respect, with the NeurIPS Code of Ethics https://neurips.cc/public/EthicsGuidelines? 问题：论文中进行的研究是否在各方面都符合 NeurIPS 伦理规范 https://neurips.cc/public/EthicsGuidelines？

                                                                                                                                                                                                        Answer: [Yes] 回答：[是]
